backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the DroneWash Dashboard defining all core data types (Job, Expense, Quote, Invoice, Contract, etc.) and persistent state with access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Motoko migration module defining old and new actor state shapes and a no-op `run` migration function that passes state through unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the DroneWash QuotePro Admin Dashboard Vite/React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication flow, profile setup, data migration, and lazy-loading the Dashboard with React Query and theme providers configured.
frontend/src/components/AddFundTransacti: Dialog component for adding inflow or outflow fund transactions to a named fund, with form validation and the `useAddFundTransaction` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AddGoalDialog.ts: Dialog component for creating monthly goals with description, target metrics, target value, and milestone tracking fields, encoding extra fields into the description string before saving.
frontend/src/components/AddInvestmentTra: A dialog component for adding investment transactions (inflow/outflow) with fields for amount, transaction type, allocation type, and description, using a mutation hook to persist the data.
frontend/src/components/AddMaintenanceEx: A dialog component for logging maintenance expenses with fields for amount, equipment type, part category, purpose, and receipt URL, submitting via a mutation hook.
Renders two memoized charts—a bar chart for monthly revenue vs. expenses and a line chart for profit projections—fetching data via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/components/ArchivedInvestme: A informational component that replaces the old archived investments UI with a notice and navigation button directing users to the new Investment Fund system.
frontend/src/components/BackupVersionsDi: A dialog that lists saved backup versions with options to download each as a JSON file or delete them, reading from and writing to a local backup store.
frontend/src/components/COGSSettings.tsx: A settings panel for configuring Cost of Goods Sold parameters (van fuel rates by city, generator fuel rate, pilot fee, chemicals cost) with local state and localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/components/ContractsManagem: A full CRUD management UI for contracts, allowing admins to create, edit, delete, and filter contracts by name/status, with form fields for client info, services, area tiers, and pricing.
frontend/src/components/CreateFundDialog: A dialog form component for creating a new financial fund with fields for name, type, spending limit, and approval threshold, using the useCreateFund mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/DataEntryForms.t: Provides forms for adding jobs and expenses, and displays them in tables with edit and delete actions using respective query hooks.
frontend/src/components/DataMigrationHan: Detects legacy data stored in localStorage and migrates it (jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, goals) to the backend via mutation hooks, showing progress and status.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmDia: A reusable alert dialog component that prompts the user to confirm a delete action, with support for a loading/deleting state.
frontend/src/components/EditExpenseDialo: A dialog form for editing an existing expense record, pre-populated with the expense's current values and submitting updates via the useUpdateExpense hook.
frontend/src/components/EditFundDialog.t: A dialog component for editing an existing fund's name, spending limit, and approval threshold, using the useUpdateFund mutation and displaying toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/EditJobDialog.ts: A dialog component for editing a job's client name, revenue, date, and sector, using the useUpdateJob mutation with toast feedback on success or error.
frontend/src/components/ErrorPanel.tsx: A reusable card component that displays an error message with an optional retry button using a destructive alert style.
frontend/src/components/ExpensesManageme: A full expenses management UI with search, category filtering, bulk/single delete, and a summary of total expenses, backed by useGetAllExpenses and useDeleteExpense hooks.
frontend/src/components/FinancialMetrics: A financial overview dashboard displaying expandable metric cards for fund balances and detailed metrics, with support for editing funds and adding fund transactions via dialogs.
A tabbed funds management page showing fund overviews, transactions, and transfers, with admin controls to create, edit, delete funds, and add transactions, including active alert display.
frontend/src/components/InvestmentFundMa: Displays investment fund overview (balance, total inflows/outflows) and transaction history in a table, with an admin-only button to add new transactions via a dialog.
Provides a form for creating invoices by selecting a quote and entering customer details, then generates and downloads a PDF upon successful creation.
frontend/src/components/InvoicesList.tsx: Lists all invoices with search/filter controls, supports PDF download, status toggle (Paid/Pending), and admin-only deletion with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/JobCalendar.tsx: Renders a monthly calendar grid showing scheduled jobs per day, with month navigation and a job details dialog on day selection.
frontend/src/components/JobDetailsDialog: A dialog for viewing and editing job details (customer info, financial fields), restricted to admin users, that submits updates via the useUpdateJob mutation.
frontend/src/components/KPIWidgets.tsx: Displays four KPI cards (Net Profit Trend, Job Completion, VAT Due, and a fund delta) by deriving metrics from financial, jobs, and invoices query hooks.
frontend/src/components/LoadingPanel.tsx: A simple card component that shows a spinning loader and an optional message while data is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceManag: Renders the maintenance fund dashboard with balance/collected/spent summary cards, a recent entries table, and admin controls to add expenses or reset the fund.
frontend/src/components/MobileNav.tsx: A slide-out sheet navigation menu for mobile viewports that lists all app tabs and conditionally adds a Settings item for admins.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyReports.t: Displays a monthly financial report with month/year selectors, key metrics, goals tracking, and CSV export/print functionality.
frontend/src/components/PricingManagemen: Admin UI for viewing and editing tiered service rates across five cleaning service types, saving changes back to the backend via the setServiceRate mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: A modal dialog that collects a new user's name, email, and role (admin or viewer) on first launch and passes the data to a parent callback.
A React component that provides a multi-service quote calculator with COGS breakdown, volume discounts, VAT, add-ons, and area-tier-based pricing, allowing users to create and save quotes for cleaning services.
frontend/src/components/QuotesList.tsx: A React component that displays a filterable, searchable table of all quotes with options to expand details, delete, and export customer-facing or internal PDF reports.
frontend/src/components/ReportingSection: A React component that displays unit economics summaries and provides export buttons for cash flow and unit economics reports in CSV and PDF formats using jobs and expenses data.
frontend/src/components/UserPreferencesD: A dialog component that lets users configure and save dashboard preferences (dark mode, layout, metric filters) to the chain via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/usePdfAttachments.ts: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend data operations including jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, funds, and more, along with local TypeScript interfaces for fund management types.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates customer-facing quote PDFs by opening a new browser window with styled HTML content and triggering the print dialog.
frontend/src/lib/reportGenerator.ts: Generates cash flow reports from jobs and expenses data, supporting both CSV download and printable PDF output via a new browser window.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page component that renders a tabbed layout with lazily-loaded feature sections (metrics, quotes, invoices, analytics, etc.) and handles backup creation, user profile display, and role-based access.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page component that presents a branded card UI and triggers Internet Identity authentication via a login button.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration that loads canister IDs from dfx JSON files, injects them as environment variables, sets up a React plugin, path aliases, and a local ICP replica proxy.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing two pending feature requests: implementing a backend `resetMaintenanceFund` admin function in Motoko and wiring it to the frontend Reset Fund button via a React Query mutation.
